ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project type */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Project management methodology (e.g., Agile, Waterfall) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_methodology FOREIGN KEY ("methodology") REFERENCES project_methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_type_id") REFERENCES project_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project to which the task belongs */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the task (1-5) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone associated with this task */,
  "estimated_hours" REAL /* Estimated hours to complete the task */,
  "actual_hours" REAL /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the milestone */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone completion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the milestone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the milestone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the milestone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Tester, Project Manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the update relates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that has dependencies */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that is dependent on the first task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_dependent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time log */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task related to the time log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the time */,
  "hours_spent" REAL /* Number of hours spent on the task */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the time was logged */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the document */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the methodology */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the methodology was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the methodology was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_label_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_label_assignments_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES task_labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_label_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., GitHub, GitLab, Jenkins) */,
  "integration_url" TEXT /* URL of the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_integrations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
